name: Snazzy Snapper
recipeIngredient: 1 Four-ounce can mushroom pieces (drain and reserve liquid)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Place fillets in a shallow baking dish.
3. Sauté onion in a little water.
4. Drain and add cracker crumbs, parsley fakes, and pepper.
5. Spread mixture over fillets.
6. In a saucepan, mix enough mushroom juice with milk to make 1 1/2 cups.
7. Blend in flour.
8. Add white wine.
9. Pour sauce over fillets and bake at 400°F for 25 minutes.
10. Sprinkle cheese and paprika on top and bake an additional 10 minutes.
